ai_findings: [AI] notes: Free-text notes column contains an embedded reference to SSN verification status, which could indirectly expose sensitive identity-verification context — consider redacting notes before sharing externally. (severity: medium)

[AI] address: Combined with city and zip, these fields enable re-identification of individuals even after other PII is redacted — recommend treating as a quasi-identifier set under GDPR. (severity: medium)
